title: veronica verna subsp. dillenii
intro: Veronica verna subsp. dillenii, also known as Dillen's speedwell or alpine speedwell, is a subspecies of the Veronica verna plant that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in herbal preparations to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to reduce fever and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Veronica verna subsp. dillenii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and have been used to support overall health and well-being.
